FunFact: Algeria knocked out Germany in 2014, reaching their first Round of 16
Argentina has won 3 World Cups (1978, 1986, 2022)
Australia switched from the OFC to AFC confederation in 2006
Austria reached the semi-finals in 1934 and 1954
Belgium's golden generation reached the 2018 semi-finals, their best finish
Bosnia qualified for their first World Cup in 2014 after independence
Brazil is the only nation to have played in every World Cup since 1930 and holds the record with 5 titles (1958, 1962, 1970, 1994, 2002)
Cabo Verde is making their first ever World Cup appearance in 2026
Canada qualified for their first World Cup in 36 years in 2022
Colombia's 5-0 win over Argentina in 1993 remains the biggest in qualifying history
DR Congo (as Zaire) was the first Sub-Saharan African team at a World Cup (1974)
Didier Drogba's plea helped end a civil war in Côte d'Ivoire after 2006 qualification
Croatia finished runner-up at the 2018 World Cup in Russia
Curaçao is making their first ever World Cup appearance in 2026
Czechoslovakia reached two World Cup finals (1934, 1962)
Ecuador reached the Round of 16 for the first time in 2006
Egypt's Mohamed Salah scored in their first World Cup match since 1990
England won their only World Cup on home soil in 1966
France has won 2 World Cups (1998, 2018) and Kylian Mbappé became the first player since Pelé to score a hat-trick in a World Cup final (2022)
Germany has won 4 World Cups and scored the most goals in World Cup history (232 goals)
Ghana was the third African nation to reach a World Cup quarter-final (2010)
Haiti was the first Caribbean nation to play in a World Cup (1974)
Iran beat USA 2-1 in a politically charged match at the 1998 World Cup
Iraq won the 2007 Asian Cup during wartime, uniting their nation
Japan co-hosted the 2002 World Cup, the first in Asia
Jordan is making their first ever World Cup appearance in 2026
Mexico has reached the Round of 16 in seven consecutive World Cups (1986-2018)
Morocco made history at the 2022 World Cup as the first African and Arab nation to reach the semi-finals
The Netherlands has finished runner-up 3 times but never won a World Cup
New Zealand went unbeaten at the 2010 World Cup with 3 draws
Norway has never lost to Brazil in World Cup history (2 wins)
Panama scored their first World Cup goal against England in 2018
Paraguay reached the quarter-finals for the first time in 2010
Portugal's Eusébio was top scorer at the 1966 World Cup with 9 goals
Qatar became the first Arab nation to host a World Cup in 2022
Saudi Arabia stunned Argentina 2-1 in their 2022 World Cup opener
Scotland has qualified for 8 World Cups but never reached the knockout stage
Senegal beat defending champions France 1-0 in their 2002 World Cup debut
South Africa was the first African nation to host a World Cup (2010)
South Korea became the first Asian team to reach a World Cup semi-final in 2002
Spain won their first and only World Cup in 2010 in South Africa
Sweden finished third at the 1994 World Cup in the USA
Switzerland went unbeaten in 2006 World Cup but exited on penalties without conceding
Tunisia was the first African team to win a World Cup match (1978)
Turkey finished third at the 2002 World Cup, their best ever result
Uruguay won the first ever World Cup in 1930 as hosts
The USA hosted the most attended World Cup in 1994 with 3.5 million fans
Uzbekistan has never qualified for a World Cup before 2026
